skill.name: youtube-channel-api-skill
skill.description: This skill helps users automatically extract structured channel data from YouTube search results via BrowserAct API. Agent should proactively apply this skill when users express needs like finding YouTube channels about specific topics, collecting data on YouTube content creators, tracking YouTube influencers in specific industries, getting YouTube channel information for competitor analysis, searching for YouTube channels related to keywords, monitoring YouTube channel updates for specific keywords, finding YouTube channels that recently published videos, extracting YouTube channel subscriber counts, discovering YouTube vloggers in specific niches, building a YouTube channel database for market research, batch extracting YouTube channel links and descriptions, or monitoring competitor channel growth.
skill.summary: Extract structured YouTube channel data from search results via BrowserAct API with subscriber counts, descriptions, and verification status.
skill.author: browser-act

security_audit.summary: Security audit evaluated 51 static findings across 2 files (189 lines). All network, env_access, and external_command patterns are legitimate API client patterns. The skill makes intentional HTTP requests to BrowserAct API with proper authentication via environment variable. No malicious intent detected. Low risk due to required API key, controlled API endpoint, and user-driven keyword input.

low_findings.title: Intentional Network Access to External API
low_findings.description: Script makes HTTP requests to BrowserAct API at api.browseract.com. This is legitimate and required for YouTube data extraction functionality. No data exfiltration detected.

content.user_title: Extract YouTube Channel Data via API
content.value_statement: Manually searching for YouTube channels and copying data is time-consuming. This skill automates YouTube channel discovery and extracts structured data including subscriber counts, descriptions, and verification status in seconds.
actual_capabilities: Search YouTube for channels matching specific keywords
Extract structured channel data including name, URL, subscriber count, and description
Filter channels by recent upload date (this week, any time)
Identify verified YouTube channels and their handles
Return channel thumbnails and full descriptions for analysis
limitations: Requires a BrowserAct API key for authentication
Results depend on BrowserAct service availability
Does not provide video-level data or analytics

use_cases.title: Influencer Research
use_cases.description: Marketing teams search for YouTube creators in specific niches to identify potential partnership candidates based on subscriber counts and verification status.

use_cases.title: Competitive Analysis
use_cases.description: Business analysts track competitor channels by extracting subscriber counts and descriptions to benchmark market presence in specific industries.

use_cases.title: Content Creator Database
use_cases.description: Researchers build curated databases of YouTube channels by keyword, extracting structured data for analysis without manual collection.

prompt_templates.title: Find YouTube Channels by Topic
prompt_templates.prompt: Use the youtube-channel-api-skill to find YouTube channels related to {topic}.

prompt_templates.title: Find Recent Channels in Niche
prompt_templates.prompt: Search for YouTube channels about {topic} that uploaded content this week using youtube-channel-api-skill.

prompt_templates.title: Build Channel List for Research
prompt_templates.prompt: Extract YouTube channel data for {topic} using youtube-channel-api-skill and compile the subscriber counts and descriptions.

prompt_templates.title: Identify Verified Channels
prompt_templates.prompt: Use youtube-channel-api-skill to find verified YouTube channels in the {industry} industry with their verification status.

output_examples.input: Find YouTube channels about AI automation
output_examples.output:
Found 3 channels:

1. AI Explained

   Description: Making artificial intelligence accessible to everyone...

2. Automation Nation
   Subscribers: 89K | Verified: No
   Handle: @automationnation
   Description: Exploring the latest in AI tools and automation workflows...

Found 5 channels:

1. Tech Talk Daily

   Description: Daily tech news and gadget reviews...

2. Review Central

   Handle: @reviewcentral

best_practices: Always ensure the BROWSERACT_API_KEY environment variable is set before running the skill
Provide specific, narrow keywords for more relevant channel results
Use the upload date filter to find actively publishing channels
anti_patterns: Do not run without a valid BrowserAct API key - the skill will fail gracefully and prompt for key setup
Avoid overly broad keywords like 'video' or 'music' which return low-quality results
Do not expect real-time data - the API polls for completion and may take several minutes

faq.question: How do I get the BrowserAct API key?
faq.answer: Sign up at browseract.com and navigate to the integrations page to copy your API key. Set it as the BROWSERACT_API_KEY environment variable.

faq.question: What data does this skill extract?
faq.answer: The skill extracts channel name, URL, subscriber count, verification status, handle, description, and thumbnail URL for matching YouTube channels.

faq.question: How long does a search take?
faq.answer: The script polls for completion with a 5-minute timeout. Most tasks complete within 1-3 minutes depending on BrowserAct service load.

faq.question: Can I filter by subscriber count?
faq.answer: The skill does not directly filter by subscriber count. You receive all matching channels and can filter the results afterward.

faq.question: What happens if my API key is invalid?
faq.answer: The skill detects 'Invalid authorization' in the response and stops with an error message prompting you to check your API key.

faq.question: Can I use this to extract video data?
faq.answer: No, this skill is specifically for channel-level data. It does not extract video titles, views, or other video-specific information.
